blended.narrative: Mont-Sainte-Anne is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3 ft. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
